caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a complex conceptual map on a black background. The map consists of various circular icons representing people and concepts, connected by blue lines. Some labels include "insights $\rightarrow$ Introduction to Burnout," "Rural Community Food System," and "Healthy Place." A central white rectangular pop-up window contains a graphic of a person holding a large red magnet. In the upper right corner of the screen, a small video inset displays a man wearing a dark blue shirt and a dark baseball cap, looking toward the screen. The browser tabs at the top list several open pages, including "Trail & Learning by Synectics" and "Future of Society by Synectics." Across the frames, the visual content remains static, with no discernible movement or changes in the map, the pop-up, or the man's position in the inset video.
